programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun Pyo intends to expel his best friend and Jan Di out of Shinhwa High School -- and out of F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di dashes to the hospital after being informed that Jun Pyo had been in an accident.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung gets a frantic call from his mother threatening to commit suicide because of his father.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi Jung's mother frantically calls him threatening to commit suicide.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A note indicates that class has been moved to the science lab. The lab is unoccupied, but Jan Di waits, not realizing that the room is filling with fumes.

programme.title: Hello, Goodbye
programme.desc: Aoi and Hazuka are classmates, but they are not friends. The two girls meet an elderly woman who wants to give a love letter to her first love. Hazuka and Aoi try to find her first love.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's father gets kidnapped by loan sharks, which inevitably forces Jan Di's mother to swallow her pride and plead for Madam Kang's help.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: The F4 guys have moved on to college while Jan Di has entered her senior year of high school. She has not heard from Jun Pyo since he left.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di waits to hear the conclusions of F3's meeting with Jun-pyo, and can tell from their look that it was not good.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: After treating Jan Di in a cruel manner, Mr. Jung prepares everything so that Jun-Pyo can visit her in Seoul. Will he be able to go without Madam Kang finding out?

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's family hears about Jun-pyo's engagement and asks her miserably if it's true.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Ji-hoo can see how hurt Jan Di is by the kiss, and continues to follow her as she stumbles around in shock.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begins seeing Jae-Kyung in a new light, like he's seeing her for the first time as a potential friend -- or maybe a kindred spirit.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Woo-bin tries to talk some sense into Yi-jung, who is determined to drink himself into a stupor.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: At home, Jun-hee reminisces about how her mother meddled in her life, in much the same way she's interfering in Jun-pyo's now.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung is waiting outside for Eun-jae, excited to see her -- until he listens in on her phone conversation; from her words, it sounds like a call to a boyfriend.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begs for Jan Di to advise him not to get married.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo tells Jan Di that he'll protect her, but to Jun-pyo's surprise, she says that she does not want to be cosseted or taken care of.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Perhaps feeling it's time to expose one truth, Mr. Jung leads Jun-hee to the unknown patient's bedside; at the sight of her father, Jun-hee breaks down.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo asks Yumi to make the lunchbox once more, confirming that Yumi had taken credit for her lunch.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Just being rich isn't enough to endure the teen oppression at Shinhwa -- loners are often marked as targets by the bored über-clique called F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A wicked rumor is spread on the Internet that a second-year student at Shinhwa High School is pregnant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Not too eager to watch Jan Di dancing with one of his best friends, Jun Pyo exits the ballroom and ends up taking out his frustrations by the poolside.

programme.title: Two on the Edge
programme.desc: Otose Nishizono ages out of the orphanage system on her 18th birthday and begins a new life in her apartment.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Making a rash choice, Jan Di tells her mother she has to go somewhere and runs off, heading toward Namsan Tower.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's bike is set ablaze while she is attacked with water balloons and blasted with a fire extinguisher.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A psychic foresees that Jan Di will be losing something significant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun Pyo intends to expel his best friend and Jan Di out of Shinhwa High School -- and out of F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di dashes to the hospital after being informed that Jun Pyo had been in an accident.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung gets a frantic call from his mother threatening to commit suicide because of his father.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi Jung's mother frantically calls him threatening to commit suicide.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A note indicates that class has been moved to the science lab. The lab is unoccupied, but Jan Di waits, not realizing that the room is filling with fumes.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's father gets kidnapped by loan sharks, which inevitably forces Jan Di's mother to swallow her pride and plead for Madam Kang's help.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: The F4 guys have moved on to college while Jan Di has entered her senior year of high school. She has not heard from Jun Pyo since he left.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di waits to hear the conclusions of F3's meeting with Jun-pyo, and can tell from their look that it was not good.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: After treating Jan Di in a cruel manner, Mr. Jung prepares everything so that Jun-Pyo can visit her in Seoul. Will he be able to go without Madam Kang finding out?

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's family hears about Jun-pyo's engagement and asks her miserably if it's true.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Ji-hoo can see how hurt Jan Di is by the kiss, and continues to follow her as she stumbles around in shock.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begins seeing Jae-Kyung in a new light, like he's seeing her for the first time as a potential friend -- or maybe a kindred spirit.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Woo-bin tries to talk some sense into Yi-jung, who is determined to drink himself into a stupor.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: At home, Jun-hee reminisces about how her mother meddled in her life, in much the same way she's interfering in Jun-pyo's now.

programme.title: The World of Us
programme.desc: A bullied girl becomes friends with a new kid during a break, but when classes start up again, their new friendship is nearly ruined when the bullying continues.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung is waiting outside for Eun-jae, excited to see her -- until he listens in on her phone conversation; from her words, it sounds like a call to a boyfriend.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begs for Jan Di to advise him not to get married.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo tells Jan Di that he'll protect her, but to Jun-pyo's surprise, she says that she does not want to be cosseted or taken care of.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Perhaps feeling it's time to expose one truth, Mr. Jung leads Jun-hee to the unknown patient's bedside; at the sight of her father, Jun-hee breaks down.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo asks Yumi to make the lunchbox once more, confirming that Yumi had taken credit for her lunch.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Just being rich isn't enough to endure the teen oppression at Shinhwa -- loners are often marked as targets by the bored über-clique called F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A wicked rumor is spread on the Internet that a second-year student at Shinhwa High School is pregnant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Not too eager to watch Jan Di dancing with one of his best friends, Jun Pyo exits the ballroom and ends up taking out his frustrations by the poolside.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Making a rash choice, Jan Di tells her mother she has to go somewhere and runs off, heading toward Namsan Tower.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's bike is set ablaze while she is attacked with water balloons and blasted with a fire extinguisher.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A psychic foresees that Jan Di will be losing something significant.

programme.title: Frances Ferguson
programme.desc: A substitute teacher's crushing discontent drives her to an ill-advised transgression.

programme.title: The Great Buck Howard
programme.desc: A law-school dropout (Colin Hanks) becomes the personal assistant of a self-important but fading mentalist (John Malkovich) who is planning a big comeback.

programme.title: I Give It a Year
programme.desc: After a quick courtship, two lovers decide to tie the knot. As their first year of marriage unfolds, temptation and incompatibility put their relationship in jeopardy.

programme.title: Infinity Baby
programme.desc: A man works for a company called Infinity Baby, which is tasked with farming out 3-month-old babies who don't age.

programme.title: Barry Munday
programme.desc: A slacker (Patrick Wilson) inherits new responsibilities after he impregnates a stranger (Judy Greer).

programme.title: The Magic of Belle Isle
programme.desc: An alcoholic, disabled novelist finds his muse again after he moves into a lakeside cabin and meets a single mother and her daughters.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: Castro's Communist Revolution sweeps through Cuba, catching an apolitical Havana club owner (Andy Garcia) in the middle and dividing his family.

programme.title: A Royal Affair
programme.desc: A young queen falls in love with her physician, and they start a revolution that changes their nation forever.

programme.title: Italian Studies
programme.desc: A mysterious woman wanders the streets of Manhattan in confusion, seemingly unsure of who she is. Finding herself inexplicably drawn to a charismatic teenager, she embarks on an adventure with him through the cityscape and into the unknown.

programme.title: Broken English
programme.desc: After a series of disastrous dates, an unhappy single woman (Parker Posey) meets a potential soul mate in a visiting Frenchman (Melvil Poupaud).

programme.title: Best Man Down
programme.desc: When their best man (Tyler Labine) dies suddenly, two newlyweds (Justin Long, Jess Weixler) must cancel their honeymoon to arrange his funeral.

programme.title: A Taste of Hunger
programme.desc: A couple sacrifice everything to get a coveted Michelin star for their popular restaurant in Copenhagen, Denmark.

programme.title: Experimenter
programme.desc: In 1961, social psychologist Stanley Milgram (Peter Sarsgaard) conducts controversial experiments designed to measure conformity, conscience and free will.

programme.title: Force majeure
programme.desc: A man's selfish reaction to the danger posed by an avalanche causes cracks in his marriage and relationships with his children.

programme.title: Two Lovers
programme.desc: A man (Joaquin Phoenix) juggles relationships with an honest, loving young woman (Vinessa Shaw) and a manipulative neighbor (Gwyneth Paltrow) who has a married boyfriend.

programme.title: Lemon
programme.desc: After Isaac's blind girlfriend walks out on him, his life goes into free fall, and he directs an unhinged staging of Chekhov's "The Seagull," attends the Passover Seder from hell, and attempts to woo a new flame.

programme.title: Person to Person
programme.desc: During a single day in New York City, different characters grapple with the mundane, the unexpected, and the larger questions permeating their lives.

programme.title: I'm Still Here
programme.desc: Director Casey Affleck follows Joaquin Phoenix as he carries out a plan to retire from acting and concentrate on a new career as a hip-hop musician.

programme.title: Bad Milo!
programme.desc: A stressed-out man (Ken Marino) discovers that a tiny demon lives in his intestine, and that excessive anxiety causes the creature to escape and slaughter the man's tormentors.

programme.title: Borderline
programme.desc: A helplessly romantic sociopath escapes from a mental institution and invades the home of a '90s pop superstar. He just wants to be loved; she just wants to survive.

programme.title: Tucker & Dale vs Evil
programme.desc: Two scruffy pals' (Tyler Labine, Alan Tudyk) backwoods vacation takes a bloody turn when ignorant college students mistake them for a pair of murderous hillbillies.

programme.title: Tim and Eric's Billion Dollar Movie
programme.desc: Would-be filmmakers Tim and Eric squander $1 billion of the sinister Schlaaang Corp.'s money and must figure out a way to pay it back.

programme.title: World's Greatest Dad
programme.desc: A high-school poetry teacher (Robin Williams) is also a single father and dreams of becoming a successful writer, but a freak accident leads to both tragedy and opportunity.

programme.title: Frank
programme.desc: An aspiring musician (Domhnall Gleeson) finds himself way out of his element after he joins a pop group led by an enigmatic figure (Michael Fassbender) who wears a giant fake head.

programme.title: Grand Piano
programme.desc: A concert pianist who has stage fright finds a threatening note written on his sheet music just moments before a performance.

programme.title: Melancholia
programme.desc: As a planet hurtles toward a collision course with Earth, two sisters (Kirsten Dunst, Charlotte Gainsbourg) cope with the approaching doomsday in different ways.

programme.title: To the Wonder
programme.desc: A man (Ben Affleck) reconnects with a childhood sweetheart (Rachel McAdams) after problems arise in his relationship with the Frenchwoman (Olga Kurylenko) he brought home to Oklahoma with him.

programme.title: Shadow Dancer
programme.desc: Arrested after a failed bombing attempt, a single mother and IRA member (Andrea Riseborough) falls into the hands of a British agent (Clive Owen) who offers her a choice: Spy on her IRA comrades, or spend a long prison term away from her young son.

programme.title: Please Stand By
programme.desc: A brilliant young autistic woman escapes her care home and goes on a road trip to deliver a script to a Hollywood competition with her no-nonsense caregiver on her trail.

programme.title: The Two Faces of January
programme.desc: After he kills a detective, a con artist (Viggo Mortensen) and his wife (Kirsten Dunst) must trust a potentially dangerous stranger (Oscar Isaac) to help them get out of Greece.

programme.title: The Life Before Her Eyes
programme.desc: A woman's (Uma Thurman) memories of a violent childhood incident that took the life of her best friend (Eva Amurri) affect her life as an adult.

programme.title: Tyrel
programme.desc: Tyler spirals out of control when he realizes he's the only black person attending a weekend birthday party in a secluded cabin.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: A young physician (Orlando Bloom) becomes dangerously obsessed with a teenage patient (Riley Keough) and falls into an illicit romance. Things quickly spin out of control when an orderly finds out and blackmails the doctor.

programme.title: Marrowbone
programme.desc: A young man and his younger siblings who have concealed the death of their mother to remain together are plagued by a sinister presence in their home.

programme.title: The Perfect Host
programme.desc: A crook on the run cons his way into a dinner party whose host is anything but ordinary.

programme.desc: A photojournalist must bring his publisher's daughter along when his latest assignment takes him into an area populated by vicious alien beasts.

programme.title: The Ones Below
programme.desc: After giving birth to her first child, a woman (Clémence Poésy) starts to believe that her downstairs neighbors have sinister intentions.

programme.title: Rabbit Trap

programme.desc: Emily Calandrelli, aerospace expert and former NASA employee, visits research institutes and NASA's astronaut facilities to unlock the mysteries of space.

programme.title: Beyond the Lights
programme.desc: A troubled star and an aspiring politician fall deeply in love, but those around the couple urge them to put their careers ahead of romance.

programme.title: Trois
programme.desc: A man (Gary Dourdan) convinces his wife (Kenya Moore) to engage in a threesome, unaware that the other woman (Gretchen Palmer) is mentally unstable.

programme.title: If Beale Street Could Talk
programme.desc: After her fiancé is falsely imprisoned, a pregnant African-American woman sets out to clear his name and prove his innocence.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: Racial tensions collide in a collection of intertwined stories involving residents of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Lee Daniels' The Butler
programme.desc: A White House butler (Forest Whitaker) has a front-row seat to history through three decades and seven presidential administrations, including those of Eisenhower (Robin Williams), Kennedy (James Marsden) and Nixon (John Cusack).

programme.title: Precious
programme.desc: Pregnant and abused, a Harlem teen (Gabourey Sidibe) enrolls in an alternative school in an attempt to bring value to her life.

programme.title: Monster's Ball
programme.desc: A racist prison guard has an affair with a Black woman after her husband, who was sentenced to capital punishment, dies.

programme.title: Freelancers
programme.desc: The son (Curtis "50 Cent" Jackson) of a fallen police officer joins the NYPD, where he falls in with his father's former partner and a band of rogue cops.

programme.title: Set Up
programme.desc: With help from a gangster, a betrayed man (Curtis "50 Cent" Jackson) seeks revenge for a heist gone wrong.

programme.title: Triple Threat
programme.desc: A crime syndicate places a hit on a billionaire's daughter, making her the target of an elite assassin squad. A band of down-and-out mercenaries protects her, fighting tooth and nail to stop the assassins from reaching their target.

programme.title: As Good as Dead
programme.desc: Bryant befriends a troubled teen and introduces him to martial arts. As Bryant's mysterious and dangerous past catches up to him, he is forced into a life and death struggle to clear his name, save the boy and get back all he left behind.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: When his brother is killed, LAPD officer Mark leaves the city to return to the island he grew up on. Seeking answers and vengeance, he soon finds himself in a bloody battle with the corrupt tycoon who's taken over the island paradise.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: A former Marine (Michael Jai White) travels to Brazil to hunt down the brutal Japanese mobsters who attacked his sister and left her for dead.

programme.title: Soldier Boyz
programme.desc: An ex-Marine prison counselor leads juvenile offenders on a mission to rescue a tycoon's daughter held hostage in Vietnam.

programme.title: Mama Flora's Family
programme.desc: A black matriarch instills values of God and family in three generations of 20th-century kin. Adapted from a book by Alex Haley and David Stevens.

programme.title: Mama Flora's Family
programme.desc: A black matriarch instills values of God and family in three generations of 20th-century kin. Adapted from a book by Alex Haley and David Stevens.

programme.title: Good Fences
programme.desc: A black attorney (Danny Glover), his wife (Whoopi Goldberg) and their two children move to a posh neighborhood in Greenwich, Conn.

programme.title: Free State of Jones
programme.desc: In Jones County, Miss., Newt Knight (Matthew McConaughey) joins forces with other farmers and a group of runaway slaves to lead a violent rebellion against the Confederacy.

programme.title: As Good as Dead
programme.desc: Bryant befriends a troubled teen and introduces him to martial arts. As Bryant's mysterious and dangerous past catches up to him, he is forced into a life and death struggle to clear his name, save the boy and get back all he left behind.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: A former Marine (Michael Jai White) travels to Brazil to hunt down the brutal Japanese mobsters who attacked his sister and left her for dead.

programme.title: Leprechaun in the Hood
programme.desc: When three rappers want to get even with a pimp, they accidentally unleash a leprechaun who goes on a killing rampage in tha 'hood.

programme.title: Leprechaun: Back 2 tha Hood
programme.desc: When Emily Woodrow and her friends happen on a treasure chest full of gold coins, they encounter trouble with a very nasty and protective Leprechaun.

programme.title: Meet the Blacks
programme.desc: A Chicago man (Mike Epps) moves his family to Beverly Hills, Calif., on the same day when all crime becomes legal for a 12-hour period.

programme.title: Fifty Shades of Black
programme.desc: In a spoof of "Fifty Shades of Grey," wealthy entrepreneur Christian Black (Marlon Wayans) introduces a young woman (Kali Hawk) to his kinky world of S&M.

programme.title: Uncle P
programme.desc: A hip-hop superstar (Percy Miller) has his hands full while watching his sister's three children in the suburbs.

programme.title: House Arrest
programme.desc: DeAndre (Jayceon Taylor) becomes involved in a computer chip scheme, and his girlfriend is charged with the crime and placed under house arrest.

programme.title: Street Smart
programme.desc: A New York journalist (Christopher Reeve) lies when his fake story about a pimp describes a real pimp (Morgan Freeman) up for murder.

programme.title: Guardian
programme.desc: A Los Angeles detective (Mario Van Peebles) encounters an evil spirit born during the Gulf War, 12 years earlier.

programme.title: Youngblood
programme.desc: An angry Vietnam veteran (Lawrence-Hilton Jacobs) leads a Los Angeles street gang in a war on drug dealers.

programme.title: Fled
programme.desc: Escaped convicts (Laurence Fishburne, Stephen Baldwin) fight while they evade authorities seeking a computer disk on Cuban mobsters.

programme.title: Phantom Punch
programme.desc: Ex-convict Sonny Liston (Ving Rhames) becomes the world heavyweight boxing champion in 1962, but his personal life is marred by run-ins with organized crime and the law.

programme.title: Facing Ali
programme.desc: Boxers George Chuvalo, Ron Lyle, Leon Spinks, Larry Holmes and other fighters discuss their experiences in the ring with Muhammad Ali.

programme.title: Ali, Parks & X: The Fight for Change
programme.desc: A look into Muhammad Ali's relationships with figureheads of the American civil rights movement.

programme.title: Free Angela and All Political Prisoners
programme.desc: College professor Angela Davis' social activism implicates her in a botched kidnapping that ends with four people dead and her name on the FBI's most-wanted list.

programme.title: Foxy Brown
programme.desc: A nurse (Pam Grier) takes revenge on a drug ring for the slaying of her undercover-officer boyfriend.

programme.title: Monster's Ball
programme.desc: A racist prison guard has an affair with a Black woman after her husband, who was sentenced to capital punishment, dies.

programme.title: Body Count
programme.desc: An art thief (Ice-T) who killed a family learns the son (Justin Theroux) and his girlfriend (Alyssa Milano) are still in the house.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Con una votación mayoritaria, Aurora es nombrada la nueva directora de la empresa. Las intrigas de Francoise hacen que Eleazar desconfíe de Candela al insinuar que recibió una joya.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Aurora hace saber a Diego que ella le entregará su corazón a otra. Tadeo está ante una decisión difícil: morir lenta y dolorosamente o una muerte rápida y sin dolor.

programme.title: La mujer de Judas
programme.desc: Juaca y Altagracia están alejadas por sus diferencias ante la boda de la pareja y son visitadas por Romero, que les avisa del vestido dejado por la Mujer de Judas.

programme.title: La mujer de Judas
programme.desc: Salomón descubre la transferencia que le hizo Scott, por lo que les avisa a Ernesto y a sus abogados para evitar que Jean intente llevarlo fuera del país.

programme.title: María de los Ángeles
programme.desc: Una joven debe enfrentar a su tía para reclamar sus derechos y fortuna y vive situaciones difíciles.

programme.title: María de los Ángeles
programme.desc: Una joven debe enfrentar a su tía para reclamar sus derechos y fortuna y vive situaciones difíciles.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Valentina siente un tremendo odio y tristeza después de que Orestes intentó envenenarla. Además, decide olvidar todo y nunca más regresar a Venezuela.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Tras la visita de Olimpia, Celeste sufre un fuerte dolor en el pecho y está grave. Por otro lado, sigue la investigación sobre el Lirio de Plata.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Valentina convence a Almudena de engañar a Orestes sobre su paradero. Por otro lado, Franklin encuentra un sospechoso de ser Lirio de Plata.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Bella de la Rosa Montiel se presenta como amiga de Valentina. Mientras tanto, Orestes pregunta por Valentina.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: La familia Villanueva exige a Rosa una explicación del porqué estaba en el despacho, ella confirma que el ladrón era el Lirio de Plata. Franklin le pide a Rosa que lo acompañe a la comisaría, pero Orestes intenta impedirlo.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Hugo, después de conocer a Rosa, consigue un nuevo empleo como periodista gracias a Franklin, y Rosa va a una entrevista en la agencia de Juan Ángel. Olimpia intenta evitar que la familia vaya a visitar a Pandora.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Mientras Eva conduce, Juana se ha quedado dormida. Al sentir que el carro se detiene, la joven se despierta y descubre que están frente a la cabaña de la montaña.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Mauricio le agradece a su tía por haber llevado a su amada. Confidencial, Eva lo insta a no decirle a Juana que ella conocía que él estaba allí, pues si la joven pierde la confianza, están perdidos.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Preocupada por lo que pueda estar ocurriendo en la habitación, Eva toma un florero y lo arroja contra el piso. Reaccionando, Juana reconoce que se había olvidado de Eva. Apenada, pide a Mauricio que se levante.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Mauricio le confiesa a Juana que necesita sentir sus labios de nuevo. Firme, la chica le sugiere no volverse a ver más. No obstante, promete avisarle cuando nazca el niño.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Desirée y Carlota se encuentran, y se disponen a salir a hacer la entrega de dinero. En ese momento, Mauricio viene de las habitaciones. Los tres cruzan sus miradas.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Al llegar a la revista, Mauricio le comenta a Enriqueta que le gustaría estar con Juana, pero hasta que Carlota no se recupere está atado de manos.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel apunta con pistola a Roberto para que confiese que viene de una banda y por eso trató de abusar de Camila. Camila le cuenta la verdad sobre Gabriel y su asesinato a Max. Julia y Celso anuncian a su familia que se van a casar.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Gregorio busca a Julia para decirle que la ama, pero ella le pide que se retire. Celso aparece para pedirle a Gregorio que se vaya, pues él y Julia se van a casar. Descubren que Ezequiel ocultaba la muerte de su hermano por vergüenza.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel le pide a Camila que no se sienta comprometida con él por ayudarle a resolver sus problemas con Roberto. Max le da un anillo de compromiso a Camila para formalizar su relación. Ezequiel organiza una reunión para Camila.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: La reunión para Camila es para que todos le digan la información que saben acerca de su mamá. Camila duda de poder ser la sobrina de Ezequiel o de Fausto. Max la tranquiliza y le pide que no se preocupe. La mamá de Max le platica toda la verdad.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Astrid le reclama a Max por preferir a Camila, quien tiene un pasado oscuro. Camila se entera de que Max no es su primo y sigue su plan de boda. Ezequiel trata de convencer a Camila de que se realice una prueba de ADN para saber si es su sobrina.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Camila cede a realizarse la prueba de ADN que Ezequiel le pide. Chila le invita unos tragos a Celso y él está nervioso de encontrarse con Julia. Octavia está convencida de que quién envía las amenazas de muerte a Ezequiel es su propia hermana.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Mientras Aurora visita a Vicente en el hospital, se encuentra con Diego y el momento se vuelve un poco incómodo. Vicente está preocupado por la empresa.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: A pesar de todo el control y autoridad que tiene Vicente sobre las empresas, Irene le pide a Aurora que ella sea su apoderada. Vicente quiere saber qué le dijo Margot a sus nietos para que accedieran al control de sus negocios.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Aurora está muy enojada con Diego por lo que dijo. Vicente sigue en el hospital e Irene lo enfrenta porque ella defiende a Margot por el testamento.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Muy a su pesar, Aurora descubre que Francoise se hizo pasar por ella. Irene habla con Margot sobre la situación de Vicente. Después, Aurora enfrenta a Francoise para decirle que se enteró de lo que hizo.

programme.title: La mujer de Judas
programme.desc: Ernesto alerta a Salomón y a Natalia de las intrigas de Alirio que ha conseguido poner a Altagracia de su lado.

programme.desc: Galilea y Juaca están seguras de que Ernesto y Salomón son inocentes, lo que las pone contra Altagracia que está decidida a separar a Natalia del corrupto Salvatierra.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Feasts for Less
programme.sub-title: Hearty Chicken Pot Pie and French Toast Crumpets with Bacon
programme.desc: From a cosy chicken hotpot with braised cabbage to cheesy French-toast crumpets with smashed peas and bacon, a quick, aromatic fish curry, and a golden pear & almond cake with orange drizzle, Jamie proves simple ingredients really can shine.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.sub-title: Stove Top Pizza with Caramelized Onions and Peppers
programme.desc: Jamie makes super-simple stuffed chicken thighs and a pizza that doesn't need the oven on. He turns the humble pancake into a showstopping stack of spinach, ham and cheesy gorgeousness.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates the one dish wonder of a casserole with a Cajun chicken tray bake and a vegetable lasagna.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.sub-title: Time Saving Take Out at Home
programme.desc: Jamie cooks up some versatile meatball kebabs, delicious crispy pork noodles, a magnificent carrot puff pastry and a humble crumble, all for under a buck per serving.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes a giant Yorkshire pudding with stuffing and roast veg, cheesy gnocchi with bacon, spicy kipper kedgeree, and easy ice cream, all for under a buck a plate.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates frozen ingredients to create a scrumptious fish pie, creamy cauliflower cheese spaghetti and a warming minestrone soup, all for under a buck per plate.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.sub-title: Whole Hog BBQ with Pitmaster Pat Martin
programme.desc: Jess teams up with legendary West Tennessee pitmaster and whole hog expert Pat Martin to cook a hog overnight and enjoy a special cut of beef from Australia.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: In windy Canyon, Texas, Jess visits West Texas A&M, where she interacts with a cloned cow, participates in a blind meat tasting experiment, and helps teach us how to break down a carcass into the cuts we see in the grocery store.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.sub-title: Alpine Lamb Ribs from Siddoway Sheep Company
programme.desc: Jess joins the lamb-raising Siddoway family as they begin sorting the animals that are ready for processing. She then returns to the lodge, where she demonstrates how to prepare and grill lamb ribs.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess visits Northstar Bison to learn about the small family-run ranch's breeding and processing operation, then prepares her signature smash burger.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess heads to Wyatt Ranches in South Texas to check out the cattle ranching operation they've been running since 1965.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess embarks on a road trip across Wisconsin with her good friend Kaitlin, stopping for a cannibal sandwich and a famous sausage from Usinger's in Milwaukee.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess loves country hams and there's no better place to visit than Benton's--a family-run business that's been perfecting curing and aging techniques for over 50 years.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.sub-title: Smoked Elk Sandwiches at Juniper Mountain Ranch
programme.desc: Jess and her friend Shaundi Campbell meet up with guides from Juniper Mountain Ranch in southeastern Idaho to cull an elk for her smoked elk sandwiches.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess heads to Oklahoma, where she takes aim at one of the state's estimated 1.5 million feral hogs. Then, she makes a wild hog sausage roll with jalapeño and cheddar.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.sub-title: Nashville Hot Dove Sliders at Redstone Ranch
programme.desc: Jess and her husband Chris head to their favorite hunting grounds, Redstone Ranch, situated in the heart of the migratory dove flyway.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew prepares a crave-able appetizer of bison tenderloin bites served with tamarind sauce and a classic Hunan peanut sauce. Then chef grills prosciutto-wrapped whole trout stuffed with lemon and herbs served with rice pilaf.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Bison Tomahawk Chop with Italian-style Eggplant and Panzanella
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern shares a simple trick for getting the most out of bison tomahawk chops.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Grilled Turkey Legs, Creamed Greens and Lemon Orzo
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares Grilled Turkey Legs, Creamed Greens and Lemon Orzo.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Braised Pigeon with Homemade Herb Gnocchi
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern cooks braised squab with olives and vinegar, a perfect meal for a fall evening.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares the ultimate shore lunch of fried walleye filets, served with a tangy homemade tartar sauce, coleslaw, and crispy fried potatoes. Next, chef grills bone-in elk chops with a simple mustard glaze over hardwood charcoal.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern butchers a whole rabbit, then braises the meat in a rich and flavorful red chile sauce. He tops it off with a simple blended tomatillo salsa and fresh cilantro. Next, chef Zimmern cooks a comforting farmhouse meal of pheasant.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Goat Curry with Rice Pilaf and Carmelized Onions
programme.desc: Chef Andrew butchers a whole goat, using the leg and backstrap for a braised curry.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: The Best Fish You're Not Eating
programme.desc: Andrew takes on "little fish, big fish," cooking grilled whole small fish over Japanese charcoal with sesame spinach, and a larger fish in a bold puttanesca-style dish. Simple techniques, big flavor, and a case for eating lower on the food chain.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Grilled Yellowtail Collars & Filets with Miso Sauce
programme.desc: Andrew cooks yellowtail two ways: grilled collars with a sweet, savory Filipino-inspired adobo sauce, and grilled filets with miso sauce, shiso butter, and charred vegetables. A lesson in using the whole fish and getting more from every cut.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Goose, one of Andrew's favorite game birds, is prepared two ways: a French onion soup-style grilled breast sandwich with caramelized onions and melted cheese, and a whole bird, cured, roasted on a beer can, and served with an apple-fennel salad.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: How to Cook a Whole Pig at Home
programme.desc: Andrew tackles suckling pig with two recipes-his take on a three-cup braise with soy, rice wine, and sesame oil, served with plancha fried rice, and a whole pig roasted over open fire and pulled for Philly-style pork sandwiches with broccoli rabe.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Bison Brats & Grilled Kebabs on Flatbread
programme.desc: Andrew butchers a whole bison leg before diving in to grinding meat for bison brats, grilling them up and topping with homemade spicy mustard. Then, he grills Middle Eastern-inspired kebabs to serve over flatbread for a feast built for sharing.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Roscoe Family Legacy: Alabama Pit Ribs
programme.desc: Pat heads to Birmingham to team up with artist and chef Roscoe Hall, cooking ribs inspired by Roscoe's family legacy.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin heads to the Cherokee National Forest for a day of fly-fishing with an old friend, and to cook up their fresh catch over the campfire.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Red Curry Braised Pork with Mustard Greens
programme.desc: Pat Martin is in the frozen tundra of Minnesota to visit his new friend, Chef Yia Vang. They brave the cold and break nearly-frozen ground to barbecue a pig's head in the earth.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Secret to Texas-Style Smoked Brisket
programme.desc: Pat and his buddy Leonard Botello use the flavors of the beloved native Post Oak to smoke a perfect Central Texas-style beef brisket.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to a picturesque cattle farm in California's Santa Maria Valley, to hear firsthand from a young pitmaster who has uncovered the secrets of real Santa Maria barbecue.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Legend of Louis Mueller's Dino Beef Ribs
programme.desc: Pat visits his close friend Wayne Mueller, third-generation pitmaster of Louis Mueller's BBQ, to learn the ins and outs of his famous dino beef ribs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Pit-Cooked Chicken with Alabama White Sauce
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to Decatur, Alabama to visit a storied institution of barbecue - Big Bob Gibson's. There, he learns the ins, the outs, and the history of a regional delicacy: pit-cooked chicken with Alabama white sauce.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde brings your basic burgers to a new level with his dry-aged beef burger with potatoes and truffle Dijon mayo, a part-beef part-pork belly burger with cheddar & an egg, and lastly a crispy mushroom tortilla burger with salsa & cheese.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde shows us how he does Sunday up right as he grills up some Vietnamese Brisket with Rice Noodles, Crispy Swordfish Summer Rolls, and tops it all off with some tasty Soju Floats. Hey, it's Sunday somewhere, right?

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.sub-title: The Art of Open Fire Cooking
programme.desc: Chef Dale goes back to the roots of cooking, building a grill over an open fire to serve up a variety of dishes, including whole smoked chicken and fish, roasted cauliflower, a sweet and tangy grilled pineapple s'more dessert.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Don't sleep on grilled chicken, especially if it's Chef Dale night to cook! He's serving up Japanese style yakitori three ways, from spicy to sweet to zesty, with crispy rice, and of course he adds his own flair to these delicious skewered snacks.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde pulls out all the stops for this daddy-sized dinner. He grills up prime rib with herb & horseradish crust, lobster & chili sauce American, charred green beans with garlic tahini, and cheddar-stuffed parker house rolls.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde grills up summer favorites perfect for any backyard BBQ. Cheddar beer brats in a pretzel bun, BBQ lamb ribs with Chinese mustard sauce, watermelon lime soju punch, & warm donuts with grilled strawberries & whipped cream for dessert.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Dale skewers ribeye, salmon, smoky eggplant dip, and grilled peaches. Food on sticks never tasted better!

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde is throwin' down a pizza spread like never before with his Chicago-style tavern pie with sausage & onion, a grilled pizza pocket with pepperoni & cheese, chicken wings a la pizzaiola, and a zesty grilled Caesar salad to finish it off.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Comforting and familiar but full of island flavor, right from the grill! Chef Dale roasts pork shoulder with chicharrones, steamy coconut rice and pigeon peas finished with frozen coconut rum drink with a charred banana.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde channels his inner sandwich lover by making an angry lobster club with pepper aioli and grilled bacon, a lamb birria torta with avocado and ramen consommé, and an Italian beef combo with chili crisp cheese sauce, giardiniera.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Feasts for Less
programme.sub-title: Hearty Chicken Pot Pie and French Toast Crumpets with Bacon
programme.desc: From a cosy chicken hotpot with braised cabbage to cheesy French-toast crumpets with smashed peas and bacon, a quick, aromatic fish curry, and a golden pear & almond cake with orange drizzle, Jamie proves simple ingredients really can shine.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Feasts for Less
programme.sub-title: Caprese Chicken Burgers and Pork and Fennel Ragu
programme.desc: From crispy, herby Caprese chicken burgers to golden spinach pies, creamy pork & fennel ragù with fresh pappardelle, and a comforting tinned peach cobbler with fruit-rippled cream, Jamie proves budget-friendly cooking can be utterly delicious.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Feasts for Less
programme.sub-title: Homemade Bagels with Egg Salad and Cherry Chocolate Mousse
programme.desc: Jamie's Thai red chicken & squash traybake uses clever tips to get more for your money, a sardine puttanesca proves budget doesn't mean basic, a bagel recipe creates a low-cost lunch and his cherry chocolate mousse is a little bit of low-cost luxury.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Feasts for Less
programme.sub-title: Creamy Broccoli & Blue Cheese Gnocchi and Beef & Potato Pasties

programme.title: Grand Designs

programme.title: Grand Designs

programme.title: Grand Designs

programme.title: Grand Designs

programme.title: Grand Designs

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Realtree's Anthony Virga takes viewers to his home turf in New Jersey and shows two epic turkey hunts back-to-back.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: David Blanton and Mike Chamberlin head west for an unforgettable Merriam turkey hunt in the Black Hills of Wyoming and Montana; from breathtaking western landscapes to heart-pounding close encounters, the Merriam turkeys put on a show.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Tyler Jordan heads back to his college stomping grounds at Ole Miss to hunt with Athletic Director Keith Carter and William Jones; after a tough few days they were finally able to find some birds that were willing to work.

programme.title: Storytellers

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Dave Peterson and Mike Winkler from "Do All Outdoors" and "Jurassic Rock" join the show.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: The boys are still at the Raven in Missouri trying to finish planting 50 acres of food plots in five days; Randy heads to the Powder River in Montana and tries to knock down his first buck of the 2025 season.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: The story of a true old school deer camp meeting new world management practices to take a raw piece of hunting land and develop it into whitetail Mecca.

programme.title: American Heroes Outdoors
programme.desc: Fishing in Colorado with law enforcement officers and non-profit Angling With Officers.

programme.title: The Raven Project

programme.desc: Nate catches up with the Oklahoma buck that he had the close call with, and Cody is able to close the chapter with a buck he has been after for a few seasons.

programme.title: Spring Thunder

programme.desc: Captain Jonathan Moss is fishing one of his favorite Central Florida lakes for largemouth bass!

programme.title: Reel Animals

programme.desc: Despite the weather, Capt. Josh Calhoon and his wife Anna take a day off to target mangrove snapper before moving into deeper water to search for quality amberjacks.

programme.title: The Green Way Outdoors
programme.desc: Kyle and Jeff get bit by catfish in Southern Oklahoma while using the most primitive fishing tactic, hand fishing.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: Andy and his son, Logan, visit the country of New Zealand; they explore vineyards, helicopter hunts and more.

programme.title: Sail Kings
programme.desc: Capt. Jared travels to Venice, Louisiana, where the Mississippi River meets the Gulf, joining Capt. Garrett George and Capt. Jesse LeBoeuf for an action-packed offshore adventure in pursuit of Redfish and Tuna.

programme.title: Ship Shape TV
programme.sub-title: Stringer Re-Foaming; Rebuilding Boats with Surplus
programme.desc: Tips for making improvements and repairs on boats and boat equipment.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.sub-title: Mahi Smackdown With Captain Josh Krieg
programme.desc: Captain Scott Walker reunites with his former mate Captain Josh Krieg for a day offshore of Plantation Boat Mart to chase birds for some mahi-mahi action.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.sub-title: Bottom Fishing With Captain Josh Krieg
programme.desc: Captains Scott Walker and Josh Krieg head offshore out of Plantation Boat Mart to bottom-fish for dinner.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.sub-title: Red Snapper With Captain Garrett Stephens
programme.desc: Captains Scott Walker and Captain Garrett Stephens make a long run into the Gulf in the Invincible Catamaran to fish for Red Snappers.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.sub-title: Fishing Shallow on a Windy Day in Hawk Channel with Capt. Chris Walter
programme.desc: Captain Scott Walker and his former mate Captain Chris Walter fish the shallow patch reefs of Hawk Channel on a windy day.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Captain Scott Walker and Nick Haddad of Return 'Em Right fish for snappers out of Hawks Cay while talking about best release practices for bottom fishing.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger visit Galveston, Texas, and stay at the iconic Tremont House; the two get shown around the waters off the coast by local guide Capt. Brian Wilson.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.sub-title: Public Land BOAT ACCESS Longbeards- New York Mountain Gobbler
programme.desc: Spring Thunder continues to roll across New York State turkey hunting public land gobblers; after finding a large tract of public land along the shores of an Adirondack Mountain lake, the guys load up the boat to try and strike up a gobbling turkey.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - Chasing Giant Aoudad In California
programme.desc: A Bird Hunter's Diary is Mark Peterson's quest to hunt and harvest the 43 different species of waterfowl; this quest takes him into three different countries, 8 states, and includes over 110 days in the field, all in one season.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun
programme.desc: Meredith learns the value of the Trash Can Slam on a flounder trip with Capt. Justin that turns into a multi-species challenge.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun
programme.desc: Capt. Justin Leake and Meredith McCord divert attention from what's not happening with the tarpon bite to using CoastMaster, light tackle and experience to find snapper success on heavily fished public spots.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: The team at Winchester Ammunition has arrived in Oregon to visit the Leupold Long Range Academy. There, they'll put Winchester's new Supreme Long Range ammunition to the test.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Join Benny Spies of Team Winchester as he shares stories of his upbringing in South Dakota. From cherished family photos to duck seasons of the past, learn how a passion for hunting was ignited and became a way of life for Benny and his family.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Highlighting the stories and people who have made the shooting sports and hunting lifestyle a part of their lives.

programme.title: Behind the Draw
programme.sub-title: Montana Public Land Mule Deer! Mike's Velvet Buck! (Part 1)
programme.desc: Hunting adventures from across the country.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: On this episode of Hunting Land Man, Slade does more summer food plot prep in hopes Pope will make an appearance! With Rain on the way Slade is able to disk and seed his Pope Summer spot!

programme.title: Shoshone Adventures
programme.desc: Shoshone Adventures' Peyton Merideth heads to Colorado with Sandy Hills hunting company on a rifle hunt to put the smack down on a nice Pronghorn. Also, we install a new upgraded trigger from Timney on his .300 Win Mag.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: Andy and his son, Logan, visit the country of New Zealand; they explore vineyards, helicopter hunts and more.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: Andy goes back to his home farm in Alabama for deer and quail hunting; he makes dishes with his former "Master Chef" contestant, Alex.

programme.title: HuntStand Presents
programme.desc: The West Texas desert has a way of pulling you in.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: Renowned turkey biologist Dr. Mike Chamberlain is hunting alongside Billy Yargus at Jay Scott Outdoors and connects on a beautiful, mature Gould's gobbler.

programme.title: Pure Hunting Short Films
programme.sub-title: Chris' New Mexico Hail Mary Bull
programme.desc: Willi and Chris have hunted NM for years with some success each year. This year they included two new friends, Nick Ventura and his dad. Willi had some success mid-hunt and with the clock winding down on the last evening, would the far off bugle…

programme.title: Hard Truths Of Conservation
programme.desc: Famous for its Mayan ruins, the Yucatán in Mexico is home to a diverse array of wildlife. After years of over-harvesting and exploitation, regulated hunting is helping to conserve large areas of this fragile ecosystem.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Realtree's Anthony Virga takes viewers to his home turf in New Jersey and shows two epic turkey hunts back-to-back.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: David Blanton and Mike Chamberlin head west for an unforgettable Merriam turkey hunt in the Black Hills of Wyoming and Montana; from breathtaking western landscapes to heart-pounding close encounters, the Merriam turkeys put on a show.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Tyler Jordan heads back to his college stomping grounds at Ole Miss to hunt with Athletic Director Keith Carter and William Jones; after a tough few days they were finally able to find some birds that were willing to work.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: ORIGINAL CONTENT - Tyler and Colton Jordan go after the eastern bird in the quest for Colton's first ever Grand Slam. David Blanton also hunts the opening day and has 6 gobblers come into the decoy.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: The boys are still at the Raven in Missouri trying to finish planting 50 acres of food plots in five days; Randy heads to the Powder River in Montana and tries to knock down his first buck of the 2025 season.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: The story of a true old school deer camp meeting new world management practices to take a raw piece of hunting land and develop it into whitetail Mecca.

programme.title: Captain's Log

programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor join Hawks Cay charter captain Jeff Malone to sample Marathon's inshore fishing from the flats to the Gulf.
